name: Grandma's Prune Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the prunes and salt in water until they are tender.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Gradually whisk flour into sour cream until smooth.
4. Stir one cup of the prune liquid into the sour cream mixture.
5. Return the mixture to the pot with the prunes.
6. Slowly bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until thickened.
(Provides servings for 6 people)
